ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in millions of dollars */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb identifier for the movie */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., wide, limited, digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the performance */,
  "t_meter_score" REAL /* Audience score (T-Meter) as a percentage */,
  "weekend_gross" REAL /* Weekend gross revenue in dollars */,
  "weeks_released" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the movie has been released */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was reported */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue in dollars */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* International gross revenue in dollars */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross revenue in dollars */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens the movie was shown on during the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_performance_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the theater */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the theater */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Chain name of the theater */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens in the theater */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the theater (e.g., IMAX, 3D, recliners) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "showings" (
  "showing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each showing */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater */,
  "showing_date" TEXT /* Date of the showing */,
  "showing_time" TEXT /* Time of the showing */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of a ticket for the showing */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the showing */,
  "screen_type" TEXT /* Type of screen (e.g., standard, IMAX, 3D) */,
  "sold_out" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the showing was sold out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("showing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_showings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, IMDb) */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Score given by the review source */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer (e.g., newspaper, blog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive mentions */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative mentions */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* Number of neutral mentions */,
  "total_mentions" INTEGER /* Total number of mentions */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment was analyzed */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "sentiment_detail" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis (e.g., key phrases, sentiment distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_sentiment_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
